sections.productsSubtitle: Search and add the products included in this campaign.

details.subtitle: Review campaign status, products, channels, and summary information

picker.selectedEmpty: Choose products from the selector, then configure quantity and discount below.
picker.modalSubtitle: Search, filter, and add products to this campaign.

list.title: How to use Campaigns

status.title: 1. Review campaign status
status.description: Planned campaigns are saved but not active yet. Active campaigns are published. Completed campaigns are finished campaigns kept for review.

filters.title: 2. Use filters
filters.description: Search by campaign name, filter by status, or filter by campaign type to find campaigns faster.

details.title: 3. Open campaign details
details.description: Click the campaign name or View to see selected products, dates, budget, forecast impact, and business advice.

publish.title: 4. Publish planned campaigns
publish.description: Publishing changes a planned campaign into an active campaign. Use this when the campaign is ready to run.

delete.title: 5. Delete carefully
delete.description: Delete a campaign only when it is wrong or no longer needed, because removing it can affect campaign tracking and reports.

list.note: Tip: Create campaigns after your products and forecasts are ready, so AIMOPS can give better campaign insights.

calendar.title: How to use Campaign Calendar

range.title: 1. Choose a date range
range.description: Use the start and end date filters to decide which campaign period you want to view.

grouping.title: 2. Understand campaign grouping
grouping.description: Campaigns are grouped by their start date, so you can quickly see what begins on each day.

status.title: 3. Check campaign status
status.description: Use the status badge to know whether the campaign is planned, active, or completed.

productsBudget.title: 4. Review products and budget
productsBudget.description: Each card shows the campaign products count, date range, and budget to help with planning.

details.title: 5. Open details
details.description: Click View to open the full campaign details page, including forecast impact and selected products.

calendar.note: Tip: This page is for campaign planning. The main calendar can also show business events.

new.title: How to create a campaign

details.title: 1. Enter campaign details
details.description: Give the campaign a clear name, choose the type, and add notes that explain the campaign goal.

schedule.title: 2. Choose a valid schedule
schedule.description: Pick a start date and end date. The end date must be after or equal to the start date.

channels.title: 3. Select channels
channels.description: Choose where the campaign will run, such as social media, email, SMS, or in-store.

products.title: 4. Select products
products.description: Choose the products included in the campaign, then enter target quantity and discount percentage when needed.

savePublish.title: 5. Save or publish
savePublish.description: Save as Planned if you are still preparing. Create and Publish when the campaign is ready to become active.

new.note: Tip: Generate forecasts before creating campaigns to get better date suggestions, Expected sales increase estimates, ROI, and business advice.

generator.title: Generate campaign suggestion
generator.subtitle: Choose how AIMOPS should build the campaign idea. The suggestion will fill this form, and the user can still edit everything.
generator.loadingSuggestion: AIMOPS is building the suggestion. This may take a few seconds...

full.title: Full suggestion
full.description: Let AIMOPS choose the products, dates, campaign type, and details.
full.helper: Best when the system should decide everything.

products.title: Use selected products
products.description: Choose products here, then AIMOPS will generate a campaign idea for them.
products.selectSubtitle: Pick the products you want AIMOPS to focus on.
products.selectedHint: Selected products will appear here. Use the Add button to include a product.
products.noProducts: No products were found. Add products first, then generate a campaign from them.

productsWithDates.title: Use selected products and dates
productsWithDates.description: Choose products and dates here, then AIMOPS will generate the suggestion.

dates.selectSubtitle: Pick the date range AIMOPS should use for this suggestion.

event.title: Based on an event
event.description: Generate a campaign suggestion around one of the confirmed events.
event.helper: Choose an existing event below. AIMOPS will use that event name.
event.selectSubtitle: This list comes from the confirmed events in your project.
event.noEvents: No past confirmed events were found. Confirm an event after it has ended, then come back to generate a campaign from it.

clearance.title: Clearance / slow stock
clearance.description: Find products that need a push and generate a campaign for them.

errors.productsRequired: Choose at least one product first.
errors.datesRequired: Choose both start and end dates first.
errors.eventRequired: Choose one event from your events list first.
